title: SoFi Q1 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI), a digital financial services company, will report Q1 earnings this Wednesday before market open. The company delivered strong Q4 results with revenues of $1.01 billion, representing 37% year-over-year growth. Management provided full-year EPS guidance that exceeded analyst expectations. Analysts project revenue growth of approximately 36.4% year-over-year for the first quarter, showing improvement from the 32.7% growth recorded in the same period last year. Comparable companies in the personal loan sector have recently reported mixed results. FirstCash achieved 25.7% revenue growth, while LendingClub posted 15.9% growth, with both beating estimates. SoFi stock has appreciated 25% over the past month, outpacing the 13% average gain across the personal loan segment. The average analyst price target stands at $23.48, compared to the current share price of $18.94. The company has demonstrated a consistent ability to exceed Wall Street's earnings expectations, suggesting analysts anticipate continued momentum heading into this earnings release.
